parameterization: softmax weights plus per-g-point absorption and Rayleigh log-scales
objective: maximum normalized clean ecCKD shortwave/heating/forcing hard-gate residual

greedy_coordinate_descent.method: cached greedy bounded coordinate descent checkpoint over absorption/Rayleigh log-scales

coefficient_joint_direction_scan.method: joint coefficient direction scan over nonzero optimized scales

post_joint_coordinate_refinement.method: small-step coordinate refinement after joint coefficient direction scan

post_coefficient_weight_refinement.method: softmax-weight coordinate refinement after coefficient optimization

finite_difference_coefficient_direction_.method: central finite-difference normalized coefficient-gradient line search

final_objective_breakdown.method: component pressure-band table refinement hard-gate breakdown

targeted_worst_metric_refinement.method: targeted current-worst-metric coordinate refinement with full-objective acceptance

scan.method: bounded coordinate scan against current worst normalized metric

separated_component_refinement.method: separated static/H2O/Rayleigh component refinement with full-objective acceptance

scan.method: bounded coordinate scan against current worst normalized metric

pressure_band_table_refinement.method: iterative component pressure-band nonnegative shortwave table refinement

refined_breakdown.method: component pressure-band table refinement hard-gate breakdown

constrained_table_optimizer_target.method: constrained table/quadrature optimizer target from dominant hard-gate residual
constrained_table_optimizer_target.recommended_next_parameterization: nonnegative shortwave coefficient-table or quadrature-bin optimizer with objective terms for TOA forcing, surface forcing, flux profiles, and heating rates
constrained_table_optimizer_target.acceptance_rule: accept only candidates that reduce the full normalized hard-gate objective and keep all clean ecCKD cases within the final hard thresholds

warm_started_topology_neighbor_refinemen.method: warm-started single-neighbor topology replacement with bounded coefficient refit

ranked_topology_neighbor_refinement.method: ranked warm-started topology replacement with bounded coefficient refit

topology_neighbor_scan.method: single-neighbor topology replacement around optimized 48-parameter state

weighted greedy 16 shortwave g-point subset with latest preflight-optimized weights, coefficient scales, and pressure-band table moves

next_required_work: Move beyond bounded pressure-band table scales: run a stronger joint coefficient/table optimizer against flux and heating residuals or jointly optimize the reduced quadrature definition; the current table-refined 48-parameter path remains far above the hard-gate target.
